strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators aligning with the AI agent requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era tooling, Playwright-adjacent Selenium courses, founded a test runner)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited demonstrated depth in Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms era)
Cloud breadth shown for AWS but GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth is light beyond GISCollective self-hosting
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, strong TypeScript/Node/React grounding, and recent direct experience building AI-agent tooling including MCP frameworks, which closely matches the role's stack and AI requirement. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js usage and relatively thin recent Kotlin/Java work, but the engineering breadth, testing discipline, and architecture exposure suggest a solid overall fit for the position.
